scripts.build:all: mkdir -p dist && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/cookunity-macos-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/cookunity-macos-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target bun-linux-arm64 --outfile dist/cookunity-linux-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/cookunity-linux-x64
